student_demographics: Liberal arts and professional programs integrated

local_context_variables.pedagogical_tone: Engaging, rigorous, and supportive. Emphasize character and intellect development, aligning with Fisher's Catholic heritage.
local_context_variables.instructor_pedagogy: Strongly influenced by bell hooks. Emphasizes engaging relational contexts over isolated tasks. Requires students to work collaboratively and deeply with the instructor to achieve learning objectives.
local_context_variables.course_design_philosophy: Favors long-form, transformative experiences. Relies heavily on repetitive practice and structured 'liturgy'—forcing students to work over a concept repeatedly to hone it and discover depth rather than skimming wide, shallow topics.
current_challenges: Students are increasingly substituting critical thought with generative AI text output in standard written assignments.
Need to transition from knowledge regurgitation to process-over-product verifiable assessments.

active_policies.academic_integrity: St. John Fisher University expects students to engage genuinely in their learning. Relying on AI text without critique is prohibited. AI tools must be used as a collaborative baseline for analysis.
active_policies.assignment_formats: Prefer architectural decision records (ADRs), visual system maps (Mermaid), and hyper-local contextual synthesis over generic essays or multiple-choice questions.
